extracted_facts.How to Play / Instructions: Guide the monster to eat the food while avoiding walls and enemies. The goal is to eat all the food in the maze to progress to the next level.

Key Game Controls.Keyboard: Use arrow keys to move the monster around the maze.
Key Game Controls.Touch: Swipe in the direction you want the monster to move.

extracted_facts.Unique Features or Modes: The game is inspired by classic maze chase games. It features different levels with increasing difficulty as you progress.
